title: ElytraCam
description: A super light weight mod that adds customizable camera rotation when flying with the elytra!
body:
(Yes I am aware of the mod _Do a Barrel Roll_, but this mod was made to be _extremely_ light weight, if you want more features download [_Do a Barrel Roll_]([https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)))

![ElytraCam Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe90ed684ea769c0b32a6765e19697d2f67fd85e_0.webp)

The current elytra flying experience isn't that great in my opinion, so here is a more immersive experience!
Your camera will roll with your player when you fly, creating a more realistic and cool effect!
To customize the limit of how far the camera can roll, please do:

```
/elytracam setanglelimit <limit 0-180>
```

I recommend anywhere between 80-150, but it's my preference (default is 150).

to disable it entirely just do 
```
/elytracam setanglelimit 0
```

## As of version 0.2 ONLY client side is required! Have fun in servers! (Just make sure there aren't any rules against mods like this)

~~This mod requires to be client side and server side(for the commands as of version 0.1, I'll fix it later to only be client side).~~

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

If you find any bugs please let me know,
you can join my [discord server]([https://discord.gg/wR6SMnJKbt](https://discord.gg/wR6SMnJKbt)) and ping me (@GuyWithGreenScreen)
